item.title: INFRA: App Shell and Navigation
item.intent: The container for the entire app — launch screen, home screen, toolbar, status bar, settings gear. Nothing can be built without the shell.
item.description: Basic app structure: LaunchScreen, home screen with Open File / New File buttons (per D-UX-1 — no onboarding). Top toolbar (format actions, source toggle, settings gear). Bottom status bar (word count slot, doctor indicator count). Navigation between home, editor, and settings. SwiftUI-based per D-PLAT-2. iOS 17+ per D-PLAT-3.
acceptanceCriteria: App launches to home screen with Open File and New File buttons within 1 second (D-PERF-1)
No onboarding, no tutorial, no account creation screens appear on first launch
Toolbar, status bar, and settings gear are visible and tappable in the editor view
VoiceOver can navigate all shell elements
App runs on iOS 17+ and crashes gracefully with a message on iOS 16
